summary: Buy consensus from 16 analysts (Apr 21 2026). Raymond James upgraded to Outperform with $115 PT. Guggenheim reiterated Buy on Feb 3 2026 with $140 PT. Jefferies last raised PT to $144 in June 2025. Wolfe Research upgrade in April 2025. One high-profile call pitched DIS as Underperform for 2026. Zacks EPS consensus for Q1 2026 down 10.8% YoY.
